/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/bin/clang++  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib CMakeFiles/mylang_tests.dir/tests/lexer/test_tokens.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mylang_objects.dir/src/diag/diagnostic.cc.o CMakeFiles/mylang_objects.dir/src/diag/diagnostic_codes.cc.o CMakeFiles/mylang_objects.dir/src/diag/diagnostic_emitter.cc.o CMakeFiles/mylang_objects.dir/src/diag/diagnostic_engine.cc.o CMakeFiles/mylang_objects.dir/src/diag/diagnostic_label.cc.o CMakeFiles/mylang_objects.dir/src/diag/fixit.cc.o CMakeFiles/mylang_objects.dir/src/diag/severity.cc.o CMakeFiles/mylang_objects.dir/src/lex/buffer/base.cc.o CMakeFiles/mylang_objects.dir/src/lex/buffer/input_buffer.cc.o CMakeFiles/mylang_objects.dir/src/lex/lexer.cc.o CMakeFiles/mylang_objects.dir/src/lex/source_manager.cc.o CMakeFiles/mylang_objects.dir/src/lex/token.cc.o CMakeFiles/mylang_objects.dir/src/object/object.cc.o CMakeFiles/mylang_objects.dir/src/parser/ast.cc.o CMakeFiles/mylang_objects.dir/src/parser/parser.cc.o CMakeFiles/mylang_objects.dir/src/parser/runtime.cc.o -o mylang_tests  /opt/homebrew/lib/libgtest_main.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libgtest.a
